app.name: Buvard
app.tagline: Share your favorite drinks with your friends

common.moderation: Alcohol abuse is dangerous for your health. Please drink responsibly.

update.availableDesc: Restart the app to apply it.

native.title: Version {{version}} available
native.description: You're on {{current}}. Get the latest from Buvard.app.

auth.name: Name
auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong, please try again.

home.title: What your friends are drinking.
home.subtitle: Keep track of what you try, see what others recommend, share your favorites.

features.title: An app built for people who take their time.

capture.title: Capture your tastings
capture.desc: Photo, rating, taste notes, location. In a few seconds, your tasting is saved forever.

share.title: Share with your friends
share.desc: Follow your friends, see what they're opening tonight, swap your favorites.

discover.title: Discover the community
discover.desc: Step out of your comfort zone. Other people's go-to bottles, the most cited aromas.

ctaBottom.title: Ready to log your first bottle?
ctaBottom.subtitle: Create your account in 30 seconds. No credit card required.

features.title: Everything you need to keep track of your tastings
features.subtitle: A simple app for enthusiasts and beginners alike. No fluff, just the essentials.

map.title: Map of your tastings
map.desc: Find where you drank what. Bar, cellar, dinner at a friend's — every memory has its place on the map.

taste.title: Detailed tasting notes
taste.desc: Aromas, balance, intensity. Build your vocabulary as you go through bottles.

responsible.title: Drink in moderation
responsible.desc: We never push you to drink more: Buvard keeps your memories, not your excesses.

download.title: Buvard in your pocket
download.subtitle: Download the app directly, no store required. Self-hosted distribution.

android.title: Android
android.desc: Download the APK and install it on your phone. Auto-updates once signed in.

ios.title: iOS
ios.desc: No App Store? No problem. Add Buvard to your home screen to use it like a real app.
ios.step1: Open this page in Safari (not another app).
ios.step2: Tap the Share button at the bottom of the screen.
ios.step3: Pick "Add to Home Screen" in the list.
ios.hint: The Buvard icon will appear like an app — tap it and you're in.

install.title: How to install the Android APK
install.step1: Download the file on your phone.
install.step2: Allow installation from this source in your settings.
install.step3: Open the file and follow the instructions.

about.title: Why Buvard?
about.subtitle: An app born from a simple frustration: everything we tasted ended up forgotten.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.body: Help anyone keep track of what they drink, without judgement and without gamification. Your tastings belong to you — we just help you organize them.

values.title: Our values
values.body: No ads, no algorithm pushing you to drink more. A sober app that respects your pace and your health.

team.title: The team
team.body: An independent project run by wine, beer and spirits lovers. We code, we taste, we iterate.

legal.title: Terms & privacy
legal.subtitle: All the legal information about using Buvard.

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.body: Access to Buvard is reserved for adults of legal drinking age in their country of residence. Users agree to publish respectful content that complies with the law.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.body: Buvard only collects data necessary for the service to work: email, credentials, content you publish. No data is sold to third parties.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.body: Only strictly necessary cookies (session, preferences) are used. No advertising tracking cookies.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For any question about your data or your use of the service: contact@buvard.app

feed.title: Feed
feed.subtitle: Your friends' latest tastings
feed.emptyHint: Add your first tasting to start the feed.

discover.title: Discover
discover.subtitle: What the community is tasting right now

fields.name: Bottle name
fields.aromasPlaceholder: Type an aroma and hit Enter
fields.placePrivacy: This location will be visible publicly with your tasting.
fields.placeFallback: Suggestions unavailable, type the name manually.

visibility.publicHint: Visible to everyone on the feed and discover.

locationDialog.noCoords: This location has no geographic coordinates.

map.emptyHint: Pick a location through the autocomplete to see it appear on the map.

actions.deleteConfirmText: This is permanent. Photos will be lost too.

levelDialog.title: Level & XP
levelDialog.subtitle: How to level up and keep your streak alive.
levelDialog.streakHint: Post at least one tasting per day to keep your streak alive. Miss a day and it resets to 1.

public.selfAction: Can't do this on your own account.

tastingDetail.notFound: This tasting doesn't exist or has been deleted.

restricted.bannedText: Your account has been banned from Buvard for breaking the rules.

onboarding.subtitle: This is how your friends will find you on Buvard.
onboarding.legalSubtitle: Before you start, accept our terms.
onboarding.birthDateHint: You must be 18 or older to use Buvard.

levels.title: Levels & grades
levels.subtitle: Every step of your tasting journey
levels.shortHint: From Gulp Virgin to God of Debauchery
levels.maxLevelNote: Level {{max}} marks the peak — becoming a Buvard Legend.
levels.loadError: Couldn't load the tiers. Try again later.
levels.gradeOverrideHint: You picked this grade as title — it shows everywhere

curious.name: Gulp Virgin
curious.desc: You've never really opened your mouth for anything stronger than a Capri-Sun. Your throat is virgin, the glass terrifies you. But trust us: it's about to pop off.

explorer.name: Cork Sucker
explorer.desc: You're starting to let loose: a cork here, a bottleneck there. The palate opens, the cravings rise. Soon you'll pounce on the first bottle that walks by.

amateur.name: Cask Swallower
amateur.desc: You knock back bottles like other people walk down stairs. Nothing kills your appetite anymore — you could swallow an entire cask without flinching.

connoisseur.name: Bottle Fucker
connoisseur.desc: Zero restraint left: you grab the bottle by the neck and bottoms-up without asking permission. Amateurs watch and regret their sparkling water.

sommelier.name: Booze Whore
sommelier.desc: You spin bottles around you like a harem. Every bar in town knows you by your performances — you rarely leave alone.

master.name: Pope of Filth
master.desc: You're the absolute reference of liquid debauchery. They invite you to orgies to bless the bottles and judge the performances. Your verdict is law.

legend.name: God of Debauchery
legend.desc: You've hit the summit: bottles bow when you walk into a bar, angels come down from heaven to pour your apéro. You're above the pantheon, above everything.

language.title: Language
language.noteCo: Corsican stays local — backend stores FR for this session.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.profilePublicHint: Visible to everyone, even without an account
privacy.searchableHint: If off, your profile doesn't appear in user search
privacy.showRatingsHint: If off, only the bottles show, not the score
privacy.showLocationHint: Country / city visible on your public profile

account.title: Account
account.subtitle: Email, password, security
account.deleteConfirmText: This is permanent. Your tastings will be lost.
